series_metadata.series_description: A quarterly claim activity report of the IC Workers Compensation claims managed by the CareWorks Managed Care Organization. The report consists of, but is not limited to, metrics such as Allowed Claim Summary, Allowed Claim Lag Time Average, Claims by Month, Claims by Day of Week, Bill Type Summary, Average Medical Cost Per Claim, ICD code allowances etc.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: from end of quarter of report. ; Electronic: from end of quarter of report
